Description: My name is Dave Grotz and I am the owner of this nursery which offers a diverse selection of rare and unusual conifers and ornamentals. Our offerings are available as field grown balled & burlapped from 1 foot tall to 25" caliper or 45 foot tall specimens or in containers from 7 gal to 150 gallon.  These can be one of a kind, hard to find foundation plants, specialty items, including large maples, weeping hemlocks, and various other conifers & rarities. We carrymore than 600 varietiesof pines, spruce, chamaecyparis, cryptomerias, cedars, katsura, magnolias, maples, parrotias, firs, sequoia, hemlock and more. Each selection can have 10 or more grades & price points. Our product line is offered balled and burlapped, containerized and including fresh cut foliage. We have two fields: 14 acres in Silverton and 12 acres in West Linn, Oregon. We pre dig & root prune numerous specimens which allows us to extract and ship them outside of the normal digging season (Oct - April).We ship all over the country and partials are easily arrangedany time of the year. We have over 3,000 containerized items.  Successfully in business for 39 years, our high quality, well pruned products distinctively set us apart and provide you a profoundly higher level of WOW factor that in turn generates a gravitational pull of customers that otherwise had no where to go.To catch a glimpse of what we are working on at any given time, join us on instagram  @fanciful_foliage.On our websitewww.peaceofmindnursery.comcheck for more product photos and information regarding our company. Additional/individual specimen/Trophy plant photos, door swags, garland & other examples of our rare cut foliage are available upon request.All plant purchase orders are documented along the path of executionincluding photos of digging, staging, and plant loading so there are no surprises when you pop those doors open at the point of destination. Not only does this allow you greater peace of mind but also helps you to plan effectively the unloading process having the proper equipment and personnel on hand.   Peace of Mind Nursery, Inc. has been referenced in numerous plant journals & magazines over the years and was featured as one of the top 5 Growers in the State of Oregon in the January Digger magazine "State of Perfection" in 2013. Awarded the Retail's Choice Award in 2018 by the OAN. Please feel welcome to call and discuss our products (503.949.4944) or to request a plant availability or email me at:dave@peaceofmindnursery.comThank you.

Name: Wooden Shoe Tulip Farm
Ships To: Northeast, Upper Midwest, Mid-Atlantic, Rocky Mountain, Southeast & Gulf, Southwest, Pacific Northwest
Description: Our family farm began in 1950 with the marriage of Ross and Dorothy and their purchase of the main farm. They worked hard expanding the farm and getting their six children through college.By the early 1980's we had over 15 acres of tulips and needed to broaden the market base. Seeing this as an opportunity, in 1983 we started the Wooden Shoe Bulb Company which had a name change to Wooden Shoe Tulip Farm in 2001.In the first few years we printed up black and white order sheets and sales were slow. Then, in 1985, we opened our fields for Easter weekend. The rest you may say is history.Now we open our fields for an entire month, end of March through the first week of May. We have greatly expanded our operation to include taking bulb orders, cut tulips and daffodils, potted tulips, a gift shop, and all sorts of food and activities on weekends for all members of the family.
